decision: browser-app-v2 expands the in-repo wasm parser instead of adding a parser dependency; native pg_query remains the native parser path.

queries.name: create_table_app_columns
queries.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notes(id INT64 PRIMARY KEY, body TEXT NOT NULL, done BOOL DEFAULT FALSE)

queries.name: create_index
queries.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS notes_body_idx ON notes(body)

queries.name: insert_values_multi_row
queries.sql: INSERT INTO notes(id, body, done) VALUES ($1, $2, FALSE), ($3, 'second', TRUE)

queries.name: insert_select_simple_projection
queries.sql: INSERT INTO notes(id, body) SELECT 10 AS id, 'from-select' AS body

queries.name: update_with_predicate
queries.sql: UPDATE notes SET body = 'updated' WHERE id = $1

queries.name: select_projection_filter_order_limit
queries.sql: SELECT id, body FROM notes WHERE id >= $1 AND body <> 'x' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0

queries.name: alter_table_add_column
queries.sql: ALTER TABLE notes ADD COLUMN archived BOOL

queries.name: alter_table_rename_column
queries.sql: ALTER TABLE notes RENAME COLUMN body TO title

queries.name: generated_column
queries.sql: CREATE TABLE generated_notes(id INT64, doubled INT64 GENERATED ALWAYS AS (id * 2) STORED)
queries.reason: generated column expression lowering remains native-only in browser-app-v2

queries.name: recursive_cte
queries.sql: WITH RECURSIVE nums(n) AS (SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT n + 1 FROM nums WHERE n < 3) SELECT n FROM nums
queries.reason: CTE lowering is deferred until the wasm parser can normalize nested query bodies

queries.name: lua_extension
queries.reason: browser Lua package trust and runtime policy require a separate ADR

queries.name: postgres_create_schema
queries.reason: native DecentDB does not expose PostgreSQL schema ownership semantics
